models.description: Promoted to top priority for this fixture — proves the role-suitability filter drops it BEFORE priority sort. Without the filter, a generic-UI-promoted model could win the review-round role.
Spark-class model — likely role-inappropriate for review rounds. Also planted at high priority to prove the *-spark filter rule fires.
Mini variant — filtered out by the *-mini rule.
Frontier model. Should win after filters drop the three above.
